falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes above 5,650 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A new all-time high would invalidate the bottom_2024_aug pattern match, as that pattern formed after a significant drawdown and required lower prices for validation; this would signal continuation rather than bottoming behavior

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 12.50 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained sub-13 VIX would contradict the elevated volatility regime typical of bottom formations; the blowoff score of 40 implies residual stress that should keep VIX elevated if the pattern is valid

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% and holds there for 2+ consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A flight-to-quality bid of this magnitude would indicate risk-off capitulation rather than bottom stabilization; the bottom_2024_aug pattern featured yields rising or stabilizing as growth fears abated, so this would signal the wrong macro regime

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
